<script>
(function(){
var STYLE_ID='mms6_memory_style_sheet_official_v10',docs=[document];
try{if(window.top&&window.top.document&&window.top.document!==document)docs.push(window.top.document);}catch(_){}
var css=`
#mms6-memory-root.mms6-root{--b:#0022AB;--bg:#F4F5F7;--card:#fff;--t:#111318;--m:#6E7686;--l:#E6EAF0;--soft:#F8F9FC;--d:#D64545;--ok:#1F9D61;--sh:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.03);--r:18px;--r2:22px;--r3:28px;--e:cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1);position:fixed!important;inset:0!important;z-index:2147483647!important;pointer-events:none!important;isolation:isolate!important;background:transparent!important;color:var(--t)!important;font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"SF Pro Text","Segoe UI",Roboto,"PingFang SC","Hiragino Sans GB","Microsoft YaHei",sans-serif!important}
#mms6-memory-root *{box-sizing:border-box!important}
#mms6-memory-root.mms6-open{pointer-events:auto!important}
#mms6-memory-root button,#mms6-memory-root input,#mms6-memory-root textarea,#mms6-memory-root select{font-family:inherit!important}
@keyframes mms6TriggerPulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.08)}50%{box-shadow:0 10px 24px rgba(0,34,171,.16)}}
[data-mms6-trigger-btn="1"].mms6-trigger-pending{animation:mms6TriggerPulse 1.18s ease-in-out infinite}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-backdrop{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(14,20,35,.24);opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .24s ease}
#mms6-memory-root.mms6-open .mms6-backdrop{opacity:1;pointer-events:auto}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-shell-wrap{position:absolute;inset:0;display:grid;place-items:center;padding:12px;opacity:0;transform:translateY(12px);transition:opacity .28s ease,transform .34s var(--e)}
#mms6-memory-root.mms6-open .mms6-shell-wrap{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-device{width:min(375px,calc(100vw - 16px));height:min(812px,calc(100vh - 16px));border-radius:32px;background:#fff;border:1px solid #D7DCE6;box-shadow:0 24px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.10);overflow:hidden;position:relative}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-device::before{content:"";position:absolute;top:8px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);width:126px;height:28px;border-radius:999px;background:#111;z-index:5}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-app{position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--bg)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-workspace{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;transform:scale(.96);opacity:0;transition:transform .72s var(--e),opacity .42s ease}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-device.mms6-ready .mms6-workspace{transform:scale(1);opacity:1}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-header{position:relative;z-index:2;padding:38px 16px 0;background:rgba(244,245,247,.92);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(230,234,240,.72)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-header-top{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;margin-bottom:10px}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-brand{font-size:12px;line-height:1.2;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:.14em;color:var(--b);text-transform:uppercase}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-top-actions{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-mini-btn{appearance:none;-webkit-appearance:none;border:1px solid var(--l);background:#fff;color:var(--t);border-radius:999px;padding:8px 12px;font-size:12px;line-height:1.1;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:var(--sh);white-space:nowrap}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-header-main{position:relative;padding:8px 92px 18px 0}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-title{margin:0 0 10px;font-size:34px;line-height:1.02;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:-.02em;color:var(--t)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-status-lines{display:grid;gap:4px;margin:0}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-status-line{font-size:13px;line-height:1.7;color:var(--m)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-status-line[hidden],#mms6-memory-root .mms6-header-note[hidden],#mms6-memory-root .mms6-bubble[hidden],#mms6-memory-root .mms6-subtabs[hidden],#mms6-memory-root .mms6-overlay-sub[hidden],#mms6-memory-root .mms6-splash[hidden],#mms6-memory-root .mms6-hidden{display:none!important}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-header-note{margin-top:10px;font-size:11px;line-height:1.7;color:#8C95A6}
#mms6-memory-root [data-shell-author="1"]{
  display:block;
  width:calc(100% + 92px);
  margin:12px -92px 0 0;
  text-align:right;
  font-size:11px;
  line-height:1.4;
  font-weight:700;
  color:#8C95A6;
  white-space:nowrap;
}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-bubble{position:absolute;top:8px;right:0;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:40px;padding:0 14px;border-radius:999px;background:var(--b);color:#fff;font-size:12px;line-height:1.1;font-weight:900;box-shadow:0 12px 24px rgba(0,34,171,.18);white-space:nowrap}

#mms6-memory-root .mms6-tabs,#mms6-memory-root .mms6-subtabs{display:flex;align-items:center;overflow-x:auto;-ms-overflow-style:none;scrollbar-width:none}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-tabs::-webkit-scrollbar,#mms6-memory-root .mms6-subtabs::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-tabs{gap:16px;padding:0 2px 12px}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-subtabs{gap:14px;padding:0 2px 6px;margin-bottom:10px}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-tab,#mms6-memory-root .mms6-subtab{appearance:none;-webkit-appearance:none;background:transparent;border:0;border-bottom:2px solid transparent;color:#8B93A2;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-tab{padding:0 0 10px;font-size:15px;line-height:1.2;font-weight:800}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-subtab{padding:0 0 8px;font-size:14px;line-height:1.2;font-weight:800}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-tab.mms6-active,#mms6-memory-root .mms6-subtab.mms6-active{color:var(--t);border-color:var(--b)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-main{flex:1 1 auto;min-height:0;position:relative}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-page{display:none;height:100%}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-page.mms6-active{display:block}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-scroll{height:100%;overflow:auto;padding:12px 16px 24px;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-card{background:var(--card);border-radius:var(--r);box-shadow:var(--sh);padding:16px;margin-bottom:12px}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-card-head{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;margin-bottom:12px}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-card-title{margin:0;font-size:18px;line-height:1.2;font-weight:900;color:var(--t)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-card-sub{margin:6px 0 0;font-size:12px;line-height:1.65;color:var(--m)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-kicker,#mms6-memory-root .mms6-list-type{font-size:11px;line-height:1.2;font-weight:900;color:var(--b);letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-note,#mms6-memory-root .mms6-inline-note{padding:12px;border-radius:14px;font-size:12px;line-height:1.7}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-note{background:var(--soft);border:1px dashed #D8DEE8;color:var(--m)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-inline-note{background:var(--soft);border:1px solid #EBEFF5;color:#465064}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:24px;padding:0 10px;border-radius:999px;font-size:12px;line-height:1.2;font-weight:800;background:#EDF1FF;color:var(--b);white-space:nowrap;flex:0 0 auto}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-pill.mms6-danger{background:#FFF1F1;color:var(--d)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-pill.mms6-ok{background:#EEF9F3;color:var(--ok)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-metric-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-bottom:12px}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-metric{background:#fff;border-radius:var(--r);box-shadow:var(--sh);padding:16px}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-metric-label{font-size:12px;line-height:1.5;color:var(--m)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-metric-value{margin-top:8px;font-size:24px;line-height:1.05;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:-.02em;color:var(--t)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-metric-hint{margin-top:6px;font-size:11px;line-height:1.5;color:#8A93A3}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-preview-block{padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--l)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-preview-block:first-child{padding-top:0;border-top:0}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-preview-text,#mms6-memory-root .mms6-row-sub,#mms6-memory-root .mms6-list-preview,#mms6-memory-root .mms6-field-note,#mms6-memory-root .mms6-detail-content,#mms6-memory-root .mms6-guide-card p{margin:8px 0 0;font-size:13px;line-height:1.75;color:#273041}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-row{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;padding:12px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--l)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-row:first-child{padding-top:0;border-top:0}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-row-label{font-size:13px;line-height:1.5;font-weight:800;color:var(--t)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-row-value{font-size:13px;line-height:1.5;color:var(--m);text-align:right;white-space:nowrap}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-actions{display:grid;gap:10px}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-btn{appearance:none;-webkit-appearance:none;width:100%;min-height:52px;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid transparent;padding:14px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;font-size:15px;line-height:1.2;font-weight:900;cursor:pointer;transition:.18s ease}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-btn:active{transform:scale(.995)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-btn.mms6-primary{background:var(--b);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 14px 28px rgba(0,34,171,.14)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-btn.mms6-ghost{background:#fff;border-color:var(--l);color:var(--t)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-btn.mms6-danger{background:#fff;border-color:#F0C9C9;color:var(--d)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-btn-meta{font-size:12px;line-height:1.2;font-weight:800;opacity:.86;white-space:nowrap}
#mms6-memory-root button[disabled]{opacity:.58!important;cursor:default!important;transform:none!important;box-shadow:none!important}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-list{display:grid;gap:10px}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-list-item{appearance:none;-webkit-appearance:none;width:100%;text-align:left;background:#fff;border:0;border-radius:18px;padding:16px;box-shadow:var(--sh);cursor:pointer}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-list-title{margin:8px 0 4px;font-size:18px;line-height:1.2;font-weight:900;color:var(--t)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-list-meta{font-size:12px;line-height:1.6;color:var(--m)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-list-foot{margin-top:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;font-size:12px;line-height:1.5;color:#8A93A3}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-grid-2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-field{display:grid;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-field label{font-size:12px;line-height:1.45;font-weight:800;color:#5B6271}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-input,#mms6-memory-root .mms6-select,#mms6-memory-root .mms6-area{width:100%;border:1px solid #DDE2EB;background:#fff;color:var(--t);border-radius:14px;padding:12px 14px;font-size:14px;line-height:1.6;outline:none}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-area{min-height:180px;resize:vertical}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-area.mms6-prompt-area{min-height:280px}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-check-list{display:grid;gap:10px}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-check-item{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;padding:12px;border-radius:14px;border:1px solid var(--l);background:#fff}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-check-item input[type="checkbox"]{width:16px;height:16px;accent-color:var(--b);margin-top:3px;flex:0 0 auto}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-setting-list{display:grid}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-setting-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 118px;gap:12px;align-items:center;padding:14px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--l)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-setting-row:first-child{padding-top:0;border-top:0}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-setting-label strong{display:block;font-size:14px;line-height:1.45;color:var(--t)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-setting-label span{display:block;margin-top:4px;font-size:12px;line-height:1.6;color:var(--m)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-setting-inline{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 72px;gap:8px}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-switch-wrap{display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;align-items:center}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-switch{position:absolute;opacity:0;pointer-events:none}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-toggle{width:52px;height:32px;background:#D9DEE8;border-radius:999px;position:relative;cursor:pointer;transition:.2s ease}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-toggle::after{content:"";position:absolute;width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;background:#fff;top:4px;left:4px;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.08);transition:.2s ease}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-switch:checked+.mms6-toggle{background:var(--b)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-switch:checked+.mms6-toggle::after{left:24px}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-tag-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-top:10px}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-chip{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;min-height:24px;padding:0 10px;border-radius:999px;background:#F1F4FA;color:#566175;font-size:12px;line-height:1.2;font-weight:700}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:20;display:none}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-overlay.mms6-open{display:block}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-overlay-mask{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(10,16,30,.28);backdrop-filter:blur(3px)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-overlay-panel{position:absolute;left:12px;right:12px;bottom:12px;max-height:78%;background:#fff;border-radius:24px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 24px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.12);animation:mms6SheetUp .24s ease;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-overlay-head{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;padding:18px 18px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--l)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-overlay-title{margin:0;font-size:20px;line-height:1.2;font-weight:900;color:var(--t)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-overlay-sub{margin:6px 0 0;font-size:12px;line-height:1.65;color:var(--m);white-space:pre-line}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-overlay-body{padding:16px 18px 20px;overflow:auto;display:grid;gap:10px}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-guide-card{background:var(--soft);border-radius:16px;padding:14px}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-guide-card h4{margin:0;font-size:15px;line-height:1.35;font-weight:900;color:var(--t)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-detail-content{margin:0;white-space:pre-wrap;background:var(--soft);border-radius:16px;padding:14px}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-splash{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:25;background:#F8F9FC;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;padding:18vh 36px 12vh;box-sizing:border-box;transition:transform .74s var(--e),opacity .48s ease}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-splash[hidden]{display:none!important}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-splash.mms6-leaving{transform:translateY(-36px) scale(1.06);opacity:0;pointer-events:none}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-ambient-1{position:absolute;top:-15%;left:-20%;width:140%;height:70%;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%,rgba(0,34,171,.12) 0%,transparent 65%);filter:blur(40px);animation:mms6AmbientFlow1 12s ease-in-out infinite alternate;pointer-events:none;z-index:1}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-ambient-2{position:absolute;bottom:-10%;right:-30%;width:150%;height:80%;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%,rgba(120,100,240,.08) 0%,transparent 60%);filter:blur(50px);animation:mms6AmbientFlow2 14s ease-in-out infinite alternate-reverse;pointer-events:none;z-index:1}
@keyframes mms6AmbientFlow1{0%{transform:scale(1) translate(0,0) rotate(0deg);opacity:.8}100%{transform:scale(1.1) translate(8%,8%) rotate(5deg);opacity:1}}
@keyframes mms6AmbientFlow2{0%{transform:scale(1) translate(0,0) rotate(0deg);opacity:.7}100%{transform:scale(1.15) translate(-8%,-5%) rotate(-5deg);opacity:1}}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-splash-top{position:relative;z-index:2;flex:0 0 auto;text-align:center}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-splash-title{margin:0;font-size:38px;line-height:1.1;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:-.02em;color:#111318}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-splash-title span{color:var(--b)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-splash-mid{position:relative;z-index:2;flex:1 1 auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;align-items:center}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-quote-box{max-width:280px;width:100%;transform:translateY(-4%)}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-quote-text{font-size:24px;line-height:1.6;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.12em;color:#2A3550;text-align:center;margin:0 0 18px}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-quote-author{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:#8C95A6;text-align:right;margin-right:8px;letter-spacing:.05em}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-quote-author::before{content:"—— ";opacity:.6}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-splash-bottom{position:relative;z-index:2;flex:0 0 auto;width:100%}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-splash-actions{display:grid;gap:16px;width:100%}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-anim-1{animation:mms6SplashEnter .8s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1) .1s both}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-anim-2{animation:mms6SplashEnter .8s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1) .25s both}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-anim-3{animation:mms6SplashEnter .8s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1) .4s both}
@keyframes mms6SplashEnter{0%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(40px) scale(.96);filter:blur(4px)}100%{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0) scale(1);filter:blur(0)}}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-toast{position:absolute;left:50%;bottom:18px;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(16px);padding:10px 14px;border-radius:999px;background:#111318;color:#fff;font-size:12px;line-height:1.2;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:.2s ease;z-index:30;white-space:nowrap}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-toast.mms6-show{opacity:1;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)}
@keyframes mms6SheetUp{from{transform:translateY(16px);opacity:0}to{transform:translateY(0);opacity:1}}
@media (max-width:430px){#mms6-memory-root .mms6-shell-wrap{padding:0}#mms6-memory-root .mms6-device{width:100vw;height:100dvh;border-radius:0;border:0;box-shadow:none}#mms6-memory-root .mms6-device::before{display:none}#mms6-memory-root .mms6-header{padding-top:calc(16px + env(safe-area-inset-top))}}
@media (max-width:360px){#mms6-memory-root .mms6-header-main{padding-right:0}#mms6-memory-root .mms6-bubble{position:static;margin-top:10px}}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-header-main.mms6-header-hero{
  padding:18px 16px 22px;
  text-align:center;
}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-title{
  margin:0;
  font-size:34px;
  line-height:1.12;
  font-weight:900;
  letter-spacing:-.02em;
  color:#111318;
}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-title span{
  color:var(--b);
}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-status-hero{
  display:grid;
  gap:6px;
  margin-top:14px;
  justify-items:center;
}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-status-slogan{
  font-size:14px;
  line-height:1.8;
  color:#8C95A6;
}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-status-hero [data-shell-line="1"],
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-status-hero [data-shell-line="2"],
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-status-hero [data-shell-line="3"]{
  font-size:12px;
  line-height:1.7;
  color:#6E7686;
}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-bubble.mms6-bubble-hero{
  position:static;
  margin:18px auto 0;
  display:inline-flex;
  min-height:42px;
  padding:0 18px;
  border-radius:12px;
  background:var(--b);
  color:#fff;
  font-size:14px;
  font-weight:900;
  box-shadow:0 10px 24px rgba(0,34,171,.16);
}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-author-hero{
  display:flex !important;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  gap:14px;
  width:100%;
  margin:18px 0 0;
  text-align:center;
  font-size:12px;
  line-height:1.5;
  font-weight:700;
  color:#8C95A6;
  white-space:nowrap;
}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-author-hero::before,
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-author-hero::after{
  content:"";
  display:block;
  width:56px;
  height:1px;
  background:#E2E7F0;
}
#mms6-memory-root .mms6-header-note{
  margin-top:10px;
  text-align:center;
  font-size:11px;
  line-height:1.7;
  color:#9AA3B2;
}
#mms6-global-trigger{
  transition:right .18s ease, transform .18s ease, box-shadow .22s ease, background .22s ease, opacity .22s ease;
}
#mms6-global-trigger.mms6-trigger-wrap-pending{
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1E4BFF,#6D3BFF) !important;
  box-shadow:0 10px 28px rgba(39,81,255,.34),0 0 0 6px rgba(39,81,255,.10),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.16) !important;
}
[data-mms6-trigger-btn="1"].mms6-trigger-pending{
  animation:mms6TriggerBusyPulse 1.05s ease-in-out infinite !important;
}
[data-mms6-trigger-btn="1"].mms6-trigger-pending::before{
  content:"";
  position:absolute;
  inset:-3px;
  border-radius:999px;
  border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.34);
  border-top-color:rgba(255,255,255,.95);
  animation:mms6TriggerSpin .9s linear infinite;
}
@keyframes mms6TriggerBusyPulse{
  0%,100%{transform:scale(1);filter:saturate(1)}
  50%{transform:scale(1.08);filter:saturate(1.15)}
}
@keyframes mms6TriggerSpin{
  from{transform:rotate(0deg)}
  to{transform:rotate(360deg)}
}
`;
for(var i=0;i<docs.length;i++){try{var d=docs[i];d.querySelectorAll('style[id^="mms5_memory_style"],style[id^="mms6_memory_style"]').forEach(function(e){e.remove()});var s=d.createElement('style');s.id=STYLE_ID;s.textContent=css;(d.head||d.documentElement).appendChild(s)}catch(_){}}})();

</script>
